subcodes.first_line: O My Name! The writings of the Afnán which thou didst send were all mentioned by this servant in His presence. Praised be God! [3.5s]... ...There is a prescribed ruling for the Huququ'llah. After the House of Justice hath come into being, the law thereof will be made manifest, in conformity with the Will of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی آثار افنان که ارسال داشتید عبد حاضر تمام آنرا ذکر نموده لله الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @Imam Husayn, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
